title: mentha × villosa var. incanotomentosa
intro: Mentha × villosa var. incanotomentosa, also known as Woolly Mint or Wild Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a natural hybrid of the peppermint and spearmint plants. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. incanotomentosa include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and calm the nervous system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications, such as salves and ointments, or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
